2.anchor: and to our sister Apphia, and to our fellow soldier Archippus, and to the church that meets in your

9.anchor: But because of our love, I prefer simply to ask you. Consider this as a request from me—Paul, an old man and now also a prisoner for the sake of Christ Jesus.
9.note: Or a prisoner of Christ Jesus.

20.anchor: Yes, my brother, please do me this favor
